steps.title: Use the crater workflow
steps.content: The colon explains how the two data sources work together. Seismic monitoring gives researchers a rough impact location, and orbital imaging lets them inspect that limited area precisely to find the new crater.

steps.title: Reject same-role meanings
steps.content: Choice A means complete, not mutually useful. Choice B would mean unnecessarily repetitive, and Choice C would mean one method can substitute for the other. The passage says the methods have different strengths that combine into a better search process. The answer is D.
